name: Macaroni & Cheese - Diner Style
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the macaroni in a large saucepan according to the directions on the package. Drain and return to the saucepan to keep warm.
2. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F.
3. In a small saucepan over medium heat, melt the butter. Add the onion and chopped green bell pepper and cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally, until crisp tender. Remove from the heat.
4. Stir in the vegetables, macaroni, cheese spread, shredded cheese, and hot red pepper sauce (if desired) into the macaroni in the saucepan. Toss until well mixed.
5. Spoon the mixture into a 2 1/2-quart casserole dish. Bake for 30 minutes or until hot and bubbly. Garnish with green pepper rings and parsley sprigs if desired.
